case_title: ALEXANDRA DALLAGO VS. MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-02-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA DALLAGO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 2-14-2023 IS DEEMED DEFECTIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE LISTED THE CLAIM WAS SERVED TO SAMANTHA GARCIA (MANAGER ONSITE) IS NOT A PROPER AGENT FOR SERVICE. PROPER AGENT FOR SERVICE AS LISTED ON THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE IS DANIEL MILLER FOR KING STREET TRADING LLC. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO REDO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-10-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA DALLAGO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
